architectureDecision.label: Singleton + audit trail on replay
architectureDecision.rationale: Hydrate and event replay update kit_workspace_status and append kit_workspace_status_events rows to match direct update-workspace-status behavior.

readyReview.decision: Planning workspace-status replay writes singleton row and audit trail events.

technicalBreakdown: Extend admitTaskStateEventStream to validate planning.* kinds and revision fields.
Implement applyPlanningWorkspaceStatusUpdated with revision bump, singleton update, and kit_workspace_status_events append.
Add unit tests for happy-path replay, revision conflict, idempotent replay, and audit row count.

acceptanceCriteria: Replay of a fixture stream produces expected kit_phase_catalog rows and kit_workspace_status singleton state.
Workspace revision mismatch rejects admission with a stable error code.
Idempotent replay of the same clientMutationId is a no-op without duplicate audit rows.
kit_workspace_status_events audit trail is populated on workspace status replay (same as live mutation path).
